title: Refined Night Vision Goggles
description: This mod adds night vision goggles
body:
This mod adds night vision goggles that toggle with the "N" key (configurable). It improves visibility in the dark areas and includes an optional overlay that can be disabled in the config
![NVG model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a140e2b3d6417980221ee28c0bd52a0f8b0d9a.png)

(glow effect not included)
![NVG on player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cca738ea2c1cdaf79f9967dfc4cf0240028b76f_0.webp)

![View through the NVG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ffa776d23d93c0a2984c4946bb630611ab27d6.png)
